dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires identification of chart pattern breakouts in direction of prevailing trend. Used Donchian breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for pattern breakout detection. ADX > 25 confirms trending market. Trend direction determined by SMA 50/200 crossover: uptrend when SMA50 < SMA200 for long entries, downtrend when SMA50 > SMA200 for short entries. Exit on reversal through SMA 20. Author silent on exits, so reversal-based exits applied. Parameters note: actual success rates from source (32%, 20%, 21%) are reference metrics only and not directly translatable to rules engine.

source_rule_text: Pattern: Chart pattern with breakout performance context. Trade in direction of prevailing market trend - upward breakouts in bull markets and downward breakouts in bear markets. Up breakouts in bull markets show strong performance with 25% climbing over 45%.
